body_transformation: The Diglett's earthy brown body now gleams with a soft pastel pink hue, its smooth, rounded form replacing the rough soil texture. Delicate lavender crystalline veins trace along its limbs and head, glowing faintly with starlight silver. Its narrow head retains its elongated shape but now features a subtle petal-like tuft at the crown, shimmering with petal gold. The base ground effect transforms into a soft, glowing cloud of stardust, replacing the muddy soil.
signature_feature: Head tuft: petal gold with crystalline veins and starlight shimmer.
